"https://api.github.com/users/miparnisari/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/miparnisari", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55866", "cvss": {"score": 3.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact
 Under concurrency, `CheckPermission` and `CheckBulkPermissions` can return `PERMISSIONSHIP_HAS_PERMISSION` for a (resource, permission, subject) whose correct answer is   `PERMISSIONSHIP_CONDITIONAL_PERMISSION`. 

 You are impacted if **all** of the following hold:

  1. Your schema has a permission combining relations with an intersection or exclusion, where a subject reaches it through a caveated branch and a non-caveated branch. For example:

```zed
  definition user {}

  caveat some_caveat(somecondition int) { somecondition == 42 }

  definition document {
    relation reader: user | user with some_caveat
    relation writer: user
    relation banned: user
    permission has_permission = (reader & writer) - banned
  }
```

  2. A subject reaches the permission via the caveated edge:

```
  document:firstdoc#reader@user:caveatedreader[some_caveat]
  document:firstdoc#writer@user:caveatedreader
```
  3. Your workload issues `LookupResources` with a `context` request parameter, concurrently with `CheckPermission/CheckBulkPermissions` for the same subject/resource, and
  4. The dispatch result cache is enabled.
  
When all of the above are true, there is an intermittent window in which:

`CheckPermission(document:firstdoc, has_permission, user:caveatedreader)` → HAS_PERMISSION (incorrect; should be CONDITIONAL_PERMISSION)

`CheckPermission(document:firstdoc, has_permission, user:caveatedreader, context = {"somecondition": 41})` → HAS_PERMISSION (incorrect; should be NO_PERMISSION)

### Patches

v1.54.0

### Workarounds
Disable the dispatch result cache (`ClusterDispatchCacheConfig` and `DispatchCacheConfig`)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4vrg-r928-h5vv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T21:42:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4vrg-r928-h5vv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4vrg-r928-h5vv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55866"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T21:42:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/authzed/spicedb/security/advisories/GHSA-4vrg-r928-h5vv", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4vrg-r928-h5vv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/authzed/spicedb/security-advisories/GHSA-4vrg-r928-h5vv", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/authzed/spicedb", "summary": "SpiceDB: Checks involving relations with caveats can result in unconditional permission when conditional permission is expected", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T17:17:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4vrg-r928-h5vv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.54.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/authzed/spicedb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.34.0, < 1.54.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: SpiceDB: Checks involving relations with caveats can result in unconditional permission when conditional permission is expected
